name: 5'x7' Block Lines Rectangular Woven Area Rug Heathered Gray - Threshold™
description:
Refresh your indoor or outdoor decor with this Block Lines Rectangular Woven Area Rug from Threshold™. This rug showcases a maze-like pattern of nested geometric blocks in heathered gray and ivory tones, creating a subtle 3D-like effect on your flooring. Designed with a flat-pile construction and spray latex backing, it’s a great choice for high-traffic areas. Plus, it can be easily cleaned with a hose for effortless upkeep.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
